name: Dr,Death Simran Chhabra Murder Case
description:
Dr. Death: Simran Chhabra Murder Case-A day to day account from investigation to trial 
by Nishant Bharihoke
A gripping tale of a criminal lawyer that unveils the dark sides of both the medical and legal professions.

This chilling story follows Nishant Bharihoke, a computer engineer turned criminal lawyer, as he is drawn into the chaos of legal malpractice while unraveling the tragic death of 22-year-old Simran Chhabra due to medical negligence.

can be bought from  www.amazon.in
